title: craspedia uniflora var. alpina
intro: Craspedia uniflora var. alpina, also known as Billy Buttons, is a flowering plant species native to Australia. The plant has been used in traditional herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Craspedia uniflora var. alpina are attributed to its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, although further research is needed to fully understand its efficacy and potential side effects.
